A0156.title: On-Chain Reputation and Credit Systems
A0156.definition: A trust scoring mechanism built on on-chain behavioral data, serving as an alternative to traditional KYC identity verification.
A0156.description: Reputation systems: on-chain transaction history; smart contract interactions; DeFi credit scores; social graphs; Sybil resistance; soulbound tokens.
A0156.limitation: Insufficient historical data; risk of manipulation; privacy leakage; lack of standardized frameworks.
